replies.text: it takes 1 acre to make just enough bio diesel for a motorcycle about 3 gallons a day. and it takes about 2 acre to grow enough grass to feed a horse. solar 1kw per square meter at 100% nothing is that high so about 100 watts per square meter is normal so 1 acre is about 404kw. considering you loose energy every step its best to go directly to the source go solar not solar to life to fuel or motion. the key is energy storage. im sure you can get more miles with 400kw with a ebike than you can on 3 gallons of gas a day and that 400kw thats per hour not day.
